description_long: This apartment building complex consists of several rectangular structures arranged in a grid-like pattern within a city block. The buildings feature flat roofs and a uniform, modern design with a combination of light and reddish-brown exterior surfaces. Windows are regularly spaced in horizontal rows, contributing to a sense of symmetry and order. The buildings are surrounded by open spaces and are set within a larger urban grid, with streets and other blocky structures nearby. The overall appearance suggests a mid-rise, multi-family residential development typical of contemporary urban planning. The buildings appear to have multiple floors and are likely constructed from concrete and brick, with glass windows.
description: A modern, mid-rise apartment building complex with flat roofs, reddish-brown and light facades, and regularly spaced windows, set within an urban grid.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the apartment buildings from an elevated angle, highlighting the front facades and the grid layout within the city block.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the buildings from the opposite side, emphasizing the reddish-brown roofs and the uniformity of the structures.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the buildings, revealing the depth of the structures and the arrangement of windows along the length.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a top-down perspective, clearly showing the flat roofs and the spatial relationship between the buildings and surrounding blocks.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in evenly spaced, horizontal rows across each floor, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance on all visible facades.
